options.name: Hellish Larynx
options.description: The model part gains Breath Attack (Str 3, AP 2, Magical Attacks, Stand and Shoot).

options.name: Trampling Hooves
options.description: Model parts without Mount or Construct gain Grind Attack (D3, Str 5, AP 2, Magical Attacks, Unmodifiable).

options.name: Horrifying Visage
options.description: One use only. May be activated at the start of a friendly Charge Phase: when activated, the model gains Horror, and its Charge Range rolls are Maximised. Duration: One Phase.

options.name: Mirrored Scales
options.description: Each Melee Attack allocated against the model that rolls a ‘1’ to hit is instead allocated to the attacking model’s Health Pool, with Automatic Hits.

options.name: Guiding Mirrored Scales
options.description: Each Melee Attack allocated against the model that rolls a ‘1’ to hit, is instead allocated to the attacking model’s Health Pool with Automatic Hits.

options.name: Mark of the Eternal Champion
options.description:
The unit or model knows (or gains) Spear of Infinity (Hereditary Spell) as an additional Learned Spell.
If the unit or model is not a Wizard, it instead gains Wizard Conclave (1), and knows Spear of Infinity (Hereditary Spell).

options.name: Unnatural Roots
options.description: A unit containing Unnatural Roots gains Resolute.

options.name: Dark Hide
options.description: At the beginning of Vanguard Units (Battle Setup, step 3.F), you may remove any unit entirely with this Manifestation from the Battlefield and Deploy them again elsewhere, following the general Deployment restrictions.

options.name: Hell Can Wait
options.description:
One use only.
May be activated just before the model’s unit rolls a Break Test: that Break Test is automatically failed, and the HP loss suffered from Supernal is halved, rounding fractions down. Duration: One Phase.

options.name: Digestive Vomit
options.description: If a model with Digestive Vomit is on on the winning side of a Combat, it gains +1 Str and +1 AP, with Duration: Permanent.

options.name: Guiding Digestive Vomit
options.description:
If a model with Digestive Vomit is on on the winning side of a Combat, it gains +1 Str and +1 AP.

Duration: Permanent.

options.name: Unholy Appetite
options.description: After a Round of Combat in which at least one attack with Unholy Appetite caused any HP loss, all attacks with Unholy Appetite gain Hatred until the end of the next Player Turn.

options.name: Guiding Segmented Shell
options.description: Attacks with Multiple Wounds(X) against the model reduce their X by 1, to a minimum of 1.

options.name: Clinging Ichor
options.description: Enemy units in contact with the model lose Devastating Charge.

options.name: Hidden Knives
options.description: Melee Attacks allocated by the model against an enemy unit’s Flank or Rear Facing gain +1 Str and +1 AP.

options.name: Sorcerous Antennae
options.description: During the Siphon the Veil step of your Magic Phase, gain one Magic Dice for each unit containing this Manifestation.

options.name: Curved Tusks
options.description:
The model part’s Melee Attacks gain +1 Str and +1 AP.
For each Melee Attack where a ‘1’ is rolled to wound, the model with Curved Tusks suffers a hit that wounds automatically, with AP 10.

options.name: Incendiary Ichor
options.description:
Aegis (3+, against Flaming Attacks), Flaming Attacks (Melee & Shooting).
The model automatically fails all Regeneration Saves.

options.name: Golden Helm
options.description: Courage Tests taken by the unit gain Minimised.

options.name: Impact Hits (2 hits) and Devastating Charge (+1 Str, +1 AP)
